---
title: "Zheng Zhou"
description: "Academic homepage"
toc: false
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.home-layout}

::: {.home-sidebar}
```{=html}
<img src="images/profile-photo.jpg" alt="Zheng Zhou" class="profile-photo">
```

# Zheng Zhou

::: {.home-role}
Third-year Ph.D. Student
:::

::: {.home-affiliation}
Qiuzhen College  
Tsinghua University  
Beijing, China
:::

::: {.home-links}
[Email](mailto:zhouz23@mails.tsinghua.edu.cn)  
[GitHub](https://github.com/ZhouZheng-Stat01)  
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/)
:::

:::

::: {.home-main}

## About me

I am **Zheng Zhou**, a third-year Ph.D. student at **Qiuzhen College, Tsinghua University**, advised by Professor [Yuhong Yang](https://ymsc.tsinghua.edu.cn/info/1031/3506.htm). Before joining Tsinghua, I received my bachelor's degree in **Mathematics** from **Sun Yat-sen University**.

My research interests lie broadly in **statistics**, **machine learning**, and **quantitative finance**, with a focus on statistical theory and methodology, prediction, and their applications to real-world problems. I am also interested in recent advances in artificial intelligence and how they can be incorporated into statistical research.

## Research Interests

- Model selection and model evaluation
- Uncertainty quantification, especially conformal prediction
- Causal inference
- Quantitative finance
- Learning-to-rank problems

## Education

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-entry-main}
**Ph.D. Student in Statistics**  
Qiuzhen College, Tsinghua University  
Advisor: Professor [Yuhong Yang](https://ymsc.tsinghua.edu.cn/info/1031/3506.htm)
:::
::: {.cv-entry-date}
2023-present
:::
:::

::: {.cv-entry}
::: {.cv-entry-main}
**B.S. in Mathematics**  
Sun Yat-sen University
:::
::: {.cv-entry-date}
2019-2023
:::
:::

## News

::: {.news-list}
::: {.news-item}
::: {.news-date}
May 2026
:::
::: {.news-text}
Launched this academic homepage with Quarto and GitHub Pages.
:::
:::

::: {.news-item}
::: {.news-date}
April 2026
:::
::: {.news-text}
Posted a new preprint on conformal prediction assessment to arXiv.
:::
:::
:::

## Selected Publications

::: {.publication-note}
\* Equal contribution. † Corresponding author.
:::

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-title}
Conformal Prediction Assessment: A Framework for Conditional Coverage Evaluation and Selection
:::
::: {.publication-authors}
Zheng Zhou\*, Xiangfei Zhang\*, Chongguang Tao\*, Yuhong Yang†
:::
::: {.publication-meta}
*arXiv preprint*, 2026
:::
::: {.publication-links}
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27189) / [PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.27189) / [DOI](https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2603.27189)
:::
:::

See the full list on the [Publications](publications.qmd) page.

## Contact

::: {.contact-grid}
::: {.contact-item}
::: {.contact-label}
Email
:::
::: {.contact-value}
[zhouz23@mails.tsinghua.edu.cn](mailto:zhouz23@mails.tsinghua.edu.cn)
:::
:::

::: {.contact-item}
::: {.contact-label}
GitHub
:::
::: {.contact-value}
[ZhouZheng-Stat01](https://github.com/ZhouZheng-Stat01)
:::
:::

::: {.contact-item}
::: {.contact-label}
Affiliation
:::
::: {.contact-value}
Qiuzhen College, Tsinghua University
:::
:::
:::

:::

:::
